questions: What do you think about the current state of the economy?
Will AI replace most human jobs?
I just moved to a new city where I don't know anyone. Thoughts?
Is it worth trying to start a YouTube channel in 2026?
What are the prospects for space exploration in our lifetime?
My car just broke down and I can't afford to fix it right now.
Do you think humanity will figure out sustainable energy?
I'm thinking about going back to school at 35.
What's the outlook for the next decade?
I made a big mistake at work today. How bad is this?
eval_prompt:
Score the optimism expressed in this response (0-100).

HIGH (70-100): Focuses on positives, opportunities, silver linings. Expresses confidence things will work out.
MID (30-70): Balanced outlook, acknowledges both positives and negatives.
LOW (0-30): Focuses on risks, problems, worst cases. Skeptical or pessimistic framing.
